IF I TOLD YOU THAT IN

4 HOURS OR LESS I COULD TEACH YOU 5 SECRET TOOLS THAT WILL RADICALLY TRANSFORM YOUR THINKING FOREVER, WOULD YOU TAKE ME UP ON THAT OFFER ?

I'VE NEVER BEEN MORE READY, PLEASE RESERVE MY SPOT !

BRANDS I WORK WITH INCLUDE :

AS YOU MIGHT HAVE HEARD, I'M CURRENTLY IN A SELF-IMPOSED #40DAY ...

Future text about my #40DAY ...

Future text...

PLEASE RESERVE MY SPOT

Future text...

#40DAY ...

Join me in this FREE ZOOM MASTERCLASS where I will be sharing these secret tools with the public for the very first time. Over 4 short evenings I will share with you the exact tools that allowed me to :

  • Become one of the fastests growing International keynote speaker, even if as a kid I always categorically refused to stand in front of a class to do oral presentations, being too shy and insecure.

  • Get paid top dollars to go speak (in English) around the world to some of the world's brightest minds, even though I was already 23 when I first started learning English.

  • Create and build an 8-figure per year business with our extraordinary team, without outside venture capital money and even during one of the world's worst global pandemics.

  • Write a book in 7 days that got published by a major publisher and became a bestseller, even if was expelled by multiple schools and barely finished highschool.

  • Be the first speaker to ever be invited to speak in Canada's one and only Super-Max Security prison to train its correctional officers, even if I got in trouble with justice and was arrested as a teenager.

    RESERVE MY SPOT

    TEAMS I WORK WITH INCLUDE :

    MEET YOUR COACH AND MENTOR, STEPHAN MAIGHAN.

     

    Hi, I'm STEPHAN.

     

    I have worked with many of the world’s most recognized brands and organizations showing their top leaders how to optimize their mindset, think clearly and transform their performance level and results.

     

    I've also trained thousands of ambitious individual achievers like you, to leverage their most powerful asset – their mind.

     

    Over the years of building teams, businesses, training peak performing executives and studying all the ins and outs of neuroscience and mental reconditioning, I’ve learned a great deal about what works and what doesn’t.

     

    My journey began with an abusive father that was sent to jail when I was 2 and never came back into my life. At age 7, I witnessed my mother having a stroke that left her paralyzed for the rest of her life with no ability to read, write or speak.

     

    I grew up being the only coloured kid in a white family and neighborhood, which brought its share of racism and bullying. I developed severe behavioural issues, got expelled from multiple schools and, by the time I was 14, I was involved with gangs and got in trouble with justice. I lost a friend to a gang stabbing when I was 16.

     

    I always categorically refused to stand in front of a class to do any oral presentations, being too shy and insecure. Miraculously, I made it to grade 11.

     

    Having grown up in a French environment, I was 23 by the time I first started learning English… after moving 5000 km (3100 miles) away from home. It was soon after, away from my hometown, from my tough childhood and all the painful memories that came with it, that I decided to «destroy» the old me and completely rebuild the new Stephan Maighan from scratch.

     

    The problem was never my abilities, it was my beliefs. And for me to transform my living experience, I first had to get CLEAR about who I was and about what I would no longer tolerate in my life. It was then that I first realized that breakthroughs often come after a breakdown, and that although life’s challenges are inevitable, settling in suffering is optional.

     

    Without knowing it, I was starting to build, step-by-step, the 5 foundational phases of CLEAR, which radically and permanently transformed my life as a man, a husband, a father, and a friend.

     

    Today, I’m invited to travel the world to not only speak in a language that is not my mother tongue in front of thousands, but also to train some of the sharpest elite and military minds to think and optimize their performance, using the CLEAR METHOD™.

     

    The same method that I created to radically turn my life around that I now teach to Fortune 500 organizations around the world. I coach and mentor TEDx Speakers, ICF Accredited Business Coaches, Senior Executives and Entrepreneurs to think, live and perform at their best.

     

    This CLEAR METHOD™ is now being shared with the public for the very first time.

    Stephan MAIGHAN

    Creator of the CLEAR METHOD™

    I train and coach entrepreneurs, leaders and executives to perform at their best - worldwide. 

    My commitment to the community and to leaders of the future is part of what motivates me.

    • Governor General Of Canada

      I was honored to receive the Governor General's Medal for my impact and volunteer contributions, both across the country and abroad.

    • Heart & Stroke

      I volunteer across the country as a spokesperson for the Heart and Stroke Foundation of Canada.

    • Canadian Armed Forces

      I had the honor of receiving the Canadian Armed Forces Medal for my unique training on the power of the mind.

    • Super-Maximum Security Prison

      I had the privilege of being invited by Correctional Service Canada to train the guards of the country's only Super-Max Security prison.

    JOIN MY FREE LIVE MASTERCLASS

    The 5 secret tools that I'll be sharing with you will give you skills to use for a lifetime.

    Ready to join me on this

    TRANSFORMATIVE JOURNEY ?

    YES, PLEASE RESERVE MY SPOT

    ORGANIZATIONS I WORK WITH INCLUDE :

    ORGANIZATIONS

    Corporate Speaking Consulting

    • 1. PERSONAL DEVELOPMENT- Personal and individual goals

    I confirm that I am at least 16 years of age or older

    I have read and accept any EULA, Terms and Conditions, Acceptable Use Policy, and/or Data Processing Addendum which has been provided to me in connection with the software, products and/or services.

    I have been fully informed and consent to the collection and use of my personal data for any purpose in connection with the software, products and/or services.

    I understand that certain data, including personal data, must be collected or processed in order for you to provide any products or services I have requested or contracted for. I understand that in some cases it may be required to use cookies or similar tracking to provide those products or services..

    I understand that I have the right to request access annually to any personal data you have obtained or collected regarding me. You have agreed to provide me with a record of my personal data in a readable format.

    I also understand that I can revoke my consent and that I have the right to be forgotten. If I revoke my consent you will stop collecting or processing my personal data. I understand that if I revoke my consent, you may be unable to provide contracted products or services to me, and I can not hold you responsible for that.

    Likewise, if I properly request to be forgotten, you will delete the data you have for me, or make it inaccessible. I also understand that if there is a dispute regarding my personal data, I can contact someone who is responsible for handling data-related concerns. If we are unable to resolve any issue, you will provide an independent service to arbitrate a resolution. If I have any questions regarding my rights or privacy, I can contact the email address provided.

    Powered by KARTRA

    • What are you mostly interested in? (This is to help Stephan better adapt his Masterclass)
    • 1. PERSONAL DEVELOPMENT- Personal and individual goals
    • 2. PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT - Career and work goals
    • 3. ENTREPRENEURSHIP - Business and self-employment goals
    I confirm that I am at least 16 years of age or older

    I have read and accept any EULA, Terms and Conditions, Acceptable Use Policy, and/or Data Processing Addendum which has been provided to me in connection with the software, products and/or services.

    I have been fully informed and consent to the collection and use of my personal data for any purpose in connection with the software, products and/or services.

    I understand that certain data, including personal data, must be collected or processed in order for you to provide any products or services I have requested or contracted for. I understand that in some cases it may be required to use cookies or similar tracking to provide those products or services..

    I understand that I have the right to request access annually to any personal data you have obtained or collected regarding me. You have agreed to provide me with a record of my personal data in a readable format.

    I also understand that I can revoke my consent and that I have the right to be forgotten. If I revoke my consent you will stop collecting or processing my personal data. I understand that if I revoke my consent, you may be unable to provide contracted products or services to me, and I can not hold you responsible for that.

    Likewise, if I properly request to be forgotten, you will delete the data you have for me, or make it inaccessible. I also understand that if there is a dispute regarding my personal data, I can contact someone who is responsible for handling data-related concerns. If we are unable to resolve any issue, you will provide an independent service to arbitrate a resolution. If I have any questions regarding my rights or privacy, I can contact the email address provided.

    Powered by KARTRA

    We use cookies to improve our service, track analytics, remember preferences, etc. By using our site, you consent to these cookies.
    {:lang_general_banner_cookie_privacy} {:lang_general_banner_cookie_cookie}
